title: Export Workflow / Present Workflow

posts.author: alakkotrypis (Alexander Lakkotrypis)
posts.cookedHtml:
There needs to be a way to export Workflow as an image or some other format so that users can either print it or display/ present it to others. For example I have a workflow below:

image1088×822 58.9 KB

I wanted to print this out so I can kind of visualize better the flow, or at which stage someone is and what should be done next. I love this feature so far and it would be a shame if it did not get exported somehow. Even a slide showing each step you would follow, according to the already numbered steps in the workflow.

Also it would be amazing if Workflows could be displayed in Dashboards, since you should be able to get data on which steps are mostly used, or which branches of IF statements you rarely go through, which could help classify/ recognise edge cases in your workflows.
